angle: Unlock a hidden camera feature on your iPhone.
hook: Did you know your iPhone can take photos without touching the screen?
script: Did you know your iPhone can take photos without touching the screen? That’s right! Go into your camera settings and enable the 'Volume Button' option. Now you can snap pics just by pressing the volume up button. It’s perfect for selfies or when the phone is out of reach. This little hack can really level up your photography game. Follow for more tips like this!
caption_body: This hidden iPhone trick is a total game changer! Have you tried it? 📸
full_caption: This hidden iPhone trick is a total game changer! Have you tried it? 📸 #tech #gadgetreview #iphonehack #mobilephotography #camera
